improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners and traders. Powered by Claude. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value prop and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or messaging apps—critical for B2B audiences. Including the price anchor and free searches reduces bounce by setting accurate expectations.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product by name and clearly states what it does, building trust and clarity. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while emphasizing the risk-free trial offer, which reduces friction and encourages visitors to engage before hitting the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's full capabilities—including voice chat, your personal workspace, and professional trade and business support. Choose monthly billing or save 30 percent with an annual plan.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the free-to-paid conversion funnel. It reassures prospects that the paywall isn't abrupt, clearly explains the value they'll unlock, and reinforces the affordable entry price. Mentioning the annual savings creates an upsell opportunity without pressure.
